name: Symantec DLP
description: Integrates with Broadcom Symantec Data Loss Prevention Enforce Server REST API for incident reporting, policy management, and data match retrieval

actions.name: List Incidents
actions.description: Retrieve a list of DLP incidents with optional filtering by date range, severity, status, and policy

parameters.name: savedReportId
parameters.description: ID of the saved report to use for filtering incidents

parameters.name: incidentCreationDateLaterThan
parameters.description: Filter incidents created after this date (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: incidentCreationDateEarlierThan
parameters.description: Filter incidents created before this date (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: incidentSeverity
parameters.description: Filter by severity level (High, Medium, Low, Info)

actions.name: Get Incident Details
actions.description: Retrieve full details of a specific DLP incident including matched data, policy violations, and remediation history

parameters.name: incidentId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the DLP incident

parameters.name: includeViolations
parameters.description: Include policy violation details in the response

parameters.name: includeHistory
parameters.description: Include incident history and audit trail

actions.name: Update Incident
actions.description: Update incident attributes such as status, severity, or custom attributes

parameters.name: incidentId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the DLP incident to update

parameters.name: incidentStatusId
parameters.description: New status ID for the incident

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: New severity level (High, Medium, Low, Info)

parameters.name: note
parameters.description: Note to add to the incident

actions.name: List Policies
actions.description: Retrieve all configured DLP policies including detection rules, response rules, and policy groups

actions.name: Get Data Matches
actions.description: Retrieve the matched sensitive data components for a given incident

parameters.name: incidentId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the DLP incident

actions.name: List Incident Statuses
actions.description: Retrieve all available incident status values configured in the system
